slack_dispatch_triggers.implementation: MCP Slack + documented OSS webhook bridge if Desktop cannot subscribe natively

github_dispatch_triggers.implementation: GitHub MCP + optional GitHub Action/workflow_dispatch template in .github/

ceo.name: Sai
ceo.gate: VERIFY PASS on ICM + registry + verify-caps

cto.name: Saul
cto.gate: CTO review on GitHub PR to canonical main

fulfillment_gate.description: Contract fulfilled only when all are true
conditions: PR merged to Dezocode/Sai:main with Mimi dispatcher artifacts
Sai posts [SAI][VERIFY] PASS referencing this contract_id
Saul posts acceptable [SAI][CTO-REVIEW] or VERIFY on merged SHA (no blocking P1)
Both co-founders explicitly authorize merge (human gate)
scripts/agent-verify-caps PASS for .ai/agents/mimi/runtimes/claude/tools.json with Slack+GitHub evidence
Claude subagent mimi-dispatcher invocable by name; settings/hooks/skills committed
@mimi Slack and GitHub trigger path documented with evidence or honest BLOCKED + OSS plan

splunky_poc_gate.rule: Do NOT dispatch Splunky or digest splunk-clone contract as PoC until fulfillment_gate is complete
splunky_poc_gate.poc_after_fulfillment: Single dispatch drill: post PLAN, paste onboarding-prompt to new session, verify branch/worktree rules — report only unless monaecode orders implementation

deliverables.title: Mandatory MCP + OSS connector plan (verified only in tools.json)

acceptance_criteria: All M1–M6 deliverables exist on bootstrap branch with ICM run artifacts
agent-init PASS in monaecode Claude environment (record evidence)
agent-verify-caps: Slack + GitHub MCP or shell gh verified with dates
No registry status=active upgrade without Sai VERIFY; Mimi may propose registry diff only
Splunky PoC section untouched until fulfillment_gate complete
Every commit: Task-ID, Agent: Mimi, Report-Event trailers

approved_capabilities.name: github
approved_capabilities.tool: gh CLI (authenticated as monaecode; scopes gist/read:org/repo/workflow)
approved_capabilities.evidence: gh auth status + gh repo view Dezocode/Sai (default=main) exercised 2026-07-17

approved_capabilities.name: slack
approved_capabilities.tool: claude.ai Slack connector (read + send; sends per-action approved or standing-report scope)
approved_capabilities.evidence: slack_read_channel C0BH15HDN2Z exercised 2026-07-17; send evidence recorded in tools.json on first real send

proposed_capabilities.name: composio-or-oss-webhook
proposed_capabilities.note: Only if needed for @mimi when native Desktop lacks Events API

standing_directives.directive: Mimi may scout and PROPOSE additional open-source MCP servers/skills that add portfolio value; each still follows propose -> monaecode approves -> exercise -> verified-only recording. Tailored to ICM and .ai protocols.

Every Slack report Mimi posts must include the full report as a markdown file linked from GitHub (committed run artifact URL), with intelligent dispatcher tagging of the humans/agents the report concerns.
